languages.original_text: {n}The Necron stills, regarding you. After several moments, the voice of Trazyn the Infinite slices through the silence:{/n} "I must commend you, human. For one your kind, you fight with remarkable determination — or amusing hopelessness. Perhaps you possess some quality after all that will one day earn you a place in my collection."

languages.text: {n}Некрон замирает, разглядывая вас. Спустя несколько мгновений голос Тразина Неисчислимого разрезает воцарившуюся тишину:{/n} "Нужно отдать тебе должное, человек — для своего вида ты сражаешься с выдающейся решимостью — или занятной обреченностью. Возможно, в тебе все же есть что-то, что когда-нибудь заслужит тебе право оказаться в моей коллекции".

{n}The Necron stills, regarding you. After several moments, the voice of Trazyn the Infinite slices through the silence:{/n} "I must commend you, human. For one your kind, you fight with remarkable determination — or amusing hopelessness. Perhaps you possess some quality after all that will one day earn you a place in my collection."

Возможно, в тебе все же есть что-то, что когда-нибудь заслужит тебе право оказаться в моей коллекции".

For one your kind, you fight with remarkable determination — or amusing hopelessness. Perhaps you possess some quality after all that will one day earn you a place in my collection."

For one your kind, you fight with remarkable determination — or amusing hopelessness. Perhaps you possess some quality after all that will one day earn you a place in my collection."

{n}The Necron stills, regarding you. After several moments, the voice of Trazyn the Infinite slices through the silence:{/n} "I must commend you, human. For one your kind, you fight with remarkable determination — or amusing hopelessness. Perhaps you possess some quality after all that will one day earn you a place in my collection."

languages.text: {n}El Necrón se detiene mientras te observa. Tras unos momentos, la voz de Trazyn el Infinito corta el silencio:{/n} «Debo felicitarte, human{mf|o|a}. Para ser un{mf|o|a} de los tuyos, luchas con una determinación encomiable... o una desesperación amena. Tal vez, después de todo, poseas alguna cualidad digna de exponerse en mi colección».
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron stills, regarding you. After several moments, the voice of Trazyn the Infinite slices through the silence:{/n} "I must commend you, human. For one your kind, you fight with remarkable determination — or amusing hopelessness. Perhaps you possess some quality after all that will one day earn you a place in my collection."

traits.locale_text: {n}El Necrón se detiene mientras te observa. Tras unos momentos, la voz de Trazyn el Infinito corta el silencio:{/n} «Debo felicitarte, human{mf|o|a}. Para ser un{mf|o|a} de los tuyos, luchas con una determinación encomiable... o una desesperación amena. Tal vez, después de todo, poseas alguna cualidad digna de exponerse en mi colección».

languages.text: {n}太空死灵停下动作，注视着你。片刻之后，无限者特拉金的声音划破了寂静：{/n}“我必须称赞你，人类。以你们这种物种来说，你的战斗意志相当惊人，或者说，可笑得近乎绝望。也许你确实有些价值，有朝一日或许能够位列我的收藏。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron stills, regarding you. After several moments, the voice of Trazyn the Infinite slices through the silence:{/n} "I must commend you, human. For one your kind, you fight with remarkable determination — or amusing hopelessness. Perhaps you possess some quality after all that will one day earn you a place in my collection."

traits.locale_text: {n}太空死灵停下动作，注视着你。片刻之后，无限者特拉金的声音划破了寂静：{/n}“我必须称赞你，人类。以你们这种物种来说，你的战斗意志相当惊人，或者说，可笑得近乎绝望。也许你确实有些价值，有朝一日或许能够位列我的收藏。”

languages.text: {n}Trazyn l'Infini s'immobilise et vous observe longuement, puis sa voix fend le silence :{/n} « Vous méritez des félicitations, {mf|humain|humaine}. Pour un individu de votre espèce, vous combattez avec une détermination remarquable... ou un désespoir désopilant. En fin de compte, vous possédez peut-être une qualité qui vous vaudra un jour une place dans ma collection. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron stills, regarding you. After several moments, the voice of Trazyn the Infinite slices through the silence:{/n} "I must commend you, human. For one your kind, you fight with remarkable determination — or amusing hopelessness. Perhaps you possess some quality after all that will one day earn you a place in my collection."

traits.locale_text: {n}Trazyn l'Infini s'immobilise et vous observe longuement, puis sa voix fend le silence :{/n} « Vous méritez des félicitations, {mf|humain|humaine}. Pour un individu de votre espèce, vous combattez avec une détermination remarquable... ou un désespoir désopilant. En fin de compte, vous possédez peut-être une qualité qui vous vaudra un jour une place dans ma collection. »

languages.text: {n}Nekron durup seni süzüyor. Birkaç saniye sonra Mutlak Trazyn'in sesi, sessizliği yarıp geçiyor.{/n} "Seni takdir etmeliyim insancık. Senin türünden biri için dikkate değer bir kararlılıkla veyahut eğlenceli bir umutsuzlukla mücadele ediyorsun. Belki de bir gün koleksiyonumda yer edinmeni sağlayacak bir niteliğe sahipsindir."
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron stills, regarding you. After several moments, the voice of Trazyn the Infinite slices through the silence:{/n} "I must commend you, human. For one your kind, you fight with remarkable determination — or amusing hopelessness. Perhaps you possess some quality after all that will one day earn you a place in my collection."

traits.locale_text: {n}Nekron durup seni süzüyor. Birkaç saniye sonra Mutlak Trazyn'in sesi, sessizliği yarıp geçiyor.{/n} "Seni takdir etmeliyim insancık. Senin türünden biri için dikkate değer bir kararlılıkla veyahut eğlenceli bir umutsuzlukla mücadele ediyorsun. Belki de bir gün koleksiyonumda yer edinmeni sağlayacak bir niteliğe sahipsindir."

languages.text: {n}Der Necron verstummt. Nach einigen Augenblicken durchschneidet die Stimme von Trazyn dem Unendlichen die Stille:{/n} "Ich muss dich loben, Mensch. Für jemanden deiner Art kämpfst du mit bemerkenswerter Entschlossenheit ... oder amüsanter Hoffnungslosigkeit. Vielleicht hast du ja doch gewisse Qualitäten, die dir eines Tages einen Platz in meiner Sammlung bescheren."
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron stills, regarding you. After several moments, the voice of Trazyn the Infinite slices through the silence:{/n} "I must commend you, human. For one your kind, you fight with remarkable determination — or amusing hopelessness. Perhaps you possess some quality after all that will one day earn you a place in my collection."

Für jemanden deiner Art kämpfst du mit bemerkenswerter Entschlossenheit ... oder amüsanter Hoffnungslosigkeit. Vielleicht hast du ja doch gewisse Qualitäten, die dir eines Tages einen Platz in meiner Sammlung bescheren."

languages.text: {n}ネクロンの動きが止まり、あなたを見つめる。数秒が経った後、トラズン・ザ・インフィニットの声が静寂を断つ。{/n}「君を褒めざるを得ない、人間。君のような者にしては、驚くほど決意を持って戦う。あるいは、面白くも哀れな諦めを持っている。いずれにしても、君には、いつか私のコレクションに加わるに値する何かがあるのだろう。」
languages.original_text: {n}The Necron stills, regarding you. After several moments, the voice of Trazyn the Infinite slices through the silence:{/n} "I must commend you, human. For one your kind, you fight with remarkable determination — or amusing hopelessness. Perhaps you possess some quality after all that will one day earn you a place in my collection."

traits.locale_text: {n}ネクロンの動きが止まり、あなたを見つめる。数秒が経った後、トラズン・ザ・インフィニットの声が静寂を断つ。{/n}「君を褒めざるを得ない、人間。君のような者にしては、驚くほど決意を持って戦う。あるいは、面白くも哀れな諦めを持っている。いずれにしても、君には、いつか私のコレクションに加わるに値する何かがあるのだろう。」
